tasks.title: Bootstrap the docs-to-task progression engine
tasks.goal: Compile the active blueprint into a machine-readable task graph and next-task runtime.
acceptance_checks: python3 -m unittest tests.test_task_progression
decision_records_required: Initial task progression engine bootstrap decision

tasks.title: Run the first machine-readable Gate A readiness review
tasks.goal: Verify that the active blueprint is frozen enough to pass Gate A and record the decision.
deliverables: Drift-check output for entry docs and active blueprint
acceptance_checks: Verify Gate A pass/fail against docs/20-current-window/15-phase-gates.md

tasks.title: Reintroduce the runner contract skeleton
tasks.goal: Create the first executable runner-contract skeleton for software-change-runner-v2.
deliverables: Ratchet metrics contribution shape or explicit null reason
acceptance_checks: Validate runner-contract shape against docs/20-current-window/REWRITE-PLAN.md and docs/10-product/CONTRACTS.md
Validate runner facts include ratchet_metrics_contribution or explicit null reason

tasks.title: Reintroduce the verifier kernel
tasks.goal: Implement the first blocking verifier for bounded runner facts.
acceptance_checks: Forced-bad case blocks

tasks.title: Create local evidence fallback
tasks.goal: Implement append-only local evidence fallback before live canonical writeback.
acceptance_checks: Evidence fallback is append-only and traceable

tasks.title: Run the first bounded executable kernel loop
tasks.goal: Prove one bounded local software_change loop with fresh evidence.
acceptance_checks: Loop emits runner facts, verifier decision, and evidence refs

tasks.title: Prove one local L1 prototype artifact
tasks.goal: Run one local clickable/runnable prototype artifact through the governed loop without external side effects.
deliverables: API-backed or API-compatible worker provider path proof
Runner facts, verifier decision, cost facts, and evidence refs
acceptance_checks: Prototype is runnable locally and produces visible output
Prototype run uses the CLI-only product surface
Prototype run exercises at least one API-backed or API-compatible worker provider path
Markdown, JSON, screenshots, and mock reports do not count

tasks.title: Review Gate B evidence
tasks.goal: Decide Gate B from regenerated executable evidence.
acceptance_checks: Gate B pass/fail decided only from fresh evidence

tasks.title: Collect the first green reliability sample window
tasks.goal: Accumulate green reliability evidence without crossing into yellow/red work.
acceptance_checks: Reliability evidence stays within green boundaries

tasks.title: Review Gate C evidence
tasks.goal: Decide Gate C from accumulated green reliability evidence.
acceptance_checks: Gate C decision is evidence-backed

tasks.title: Prepare the first yellow review pack
tasks.goal: Prepare yellow review payloads without enabling yellow runtime autonomy.
deliverables: Deploy-preview payload template with no production authority
acceptance_checks: No yellow auto-approval is enabled

tasks.title: Review Gate D evidence
tasks.goal: Decide Gate D for yellow preparation without widening runtime autonomy.
acceptance_checks: Yellow preparation remains human-gated

tasks.title: Run the first operational validation window
tasks.goal: Use the completed local kernel, collect repeatable operational data, and write a machine-readable validation report.
deliverables: Current-kernel validation report with at least three iterations
acceptance_checks: uv run python bin/run_operational_validation.py --iterations 3
uv run python -m unittest tests.test_operational_validation
Validation report aggregate.pass is true

tasks.title: Review Gate E operational validation evidence
tasks.goal: Decide Gate E from the operational validation report without widening runtime autonomy.
acceptance_checks: Gate E decision is evidence-backed
Gate E does not authorize broader runtime autonomy

tasks.title: Draft the provider adapter kernel activation proposal
tasks.goal: Turn the Gate E operational validation result into a bounded proposal for the next provider-adapter-kernel slice.
scope_in: raw output snapshot and digest contract
deliverables: Acceptance criteria for the first provider adapter implementation slice
acceptance_checks: Proposal is bounded to local/API-compatible provider work
Proposal does not authorize paid provider calls or subscription CLI daemonization
Proposal defines raw+parsed provider evidence requirements

tasks.title: Review Gate F provider adapter activation
tasks.goal: Decide whether the provider adapter kernel activation proposal is bounded enough to unlock the first local implementation slice.
deliverables: Gate F provider adapter activation review
acceptance_checks: Gate F decision is evidence-backed
Gate F does not authorize paid provider calls or subscription CLI daemonization
Gate F only unlocks local/API-compatible provider adapter implementation
decision_records_required: Gate F provider adapter activation decision

tasks.title: Implement the first provider adapter kernel
tasks.goal: Implement a repo-local provider adapter kernel that normalizes API-compatible stub output into provider evidence without calling real paid providers.
scope_out: Codex CLI or Claude Code CLI daemonization
acceptance_checks: uv run python bin/run_provider_adapter_stub.py --provider-fixture runtime/fixtures/provider-output.ok.json
uv run python -m unittest tests.test_provider_adapter
uv run ruff check runtime_engine bin tests
uv run mypy runtime_engine bin

tasks.title: Review Gate G provider adapter kernel evidence
tasks.goal: Review generated provider adapter evidence and decide whether the local provider adapter kernel is usable as the next governed worker-provider foundation.
deliverables: Gate G provider adapter kernel review
acceptance_checks: Gate G decision is evidence-backed
Generated provider evidence has drift_detected false for ok fixture
Forced drift fixture is covered by tests
Gate G does not authorize real provider calls
decision_records_required: Gate G provider adapter kernel decision

tasks.title: Draft the devmasterd local control-plane activation proposal
tasks.goal: Turn the validated provider adapter kernel into a bounded proposal for the first local devmasterd control-plane slice.
acceptance_checks: Proposal is bounded to local daemon/control-plane design
Proposal requires token auth even on localhost
Proposal does not authorize implementation, paid provider calls, or external repo mutation

tasks.title: Review Gate H devmasterd local control-plane activation
tasks.goal: Decide whether the devmasterd local control-plane proposal is bounded enough to unlock the first localhost-only daemon kernel.
acceptance_checks: Gate H decision is evidence-backed
Gate H requires token auth even on localhost
Gate H only unlocks localhost daemon kernel implementation

tasks.title: Implement the first devmasterd local kernel
tasks.goal: Implement a localhost-only devmasterd kernel with token auth, local queue/state/evidence APIs, and provider adapter stub integration.
acceptance_checks: uv run python -m unittest tests.test_devmasterd
uv run ruff check runtime_engine bin tests
uv run mypy runtime_engine bin

tasks.title: Review Gate I devmasterd local kernel evidence
tasks.goal: Review the first localhost-only devmasterd kernel and decide whether it is usable as the local control-plane foundation.
deliverables: Gate I devmasterd local kernel review
acceptance_checks: Gate I confirms unauthorized requests fail
Gate I confirms intake -> authorize -> run-provider works locally
Gate I does not authorize Web, IDE, real provider calls, or external repo mutation
decision_records_required: Gate I devmasterd local kernel decision

tasks.title: Run the devmasterd operational validation window
tasks.goal: Use the localhost-only devmasterd kernel repeatedly and collect operational evidence before adding UI or real provider integrations.
acceptance_checks: Validation runs at least three devmasterd smoke iterations
Unauthorized requests return 401 in every iteration
intake -> authorize -> run-provider -> evidence passes in every iteration
No external side effects are recorded

tasks.title: Review Gate J devmasterd operational validation evidence
tasks.goal: Review repeated devmasterd operational validation evidence before any UI or real provider activation.
deliverables: Gate J devmasterd operational validation review
acceptance_checks: Gate J confirms all validation iterations passed
Gate J confirms no external side effects occurred
Gate J does not authorize UI or real provider activation
decision_records_required: Gate J devmasterd operational validation decision

tasks.title: Draft the CLI control-surface activation proposal
tasks.goal: Turn the validated devmasterd localhost kernel into a bounded proposal for the first CLI client/control surface.
acceptance_checks: Proposal keeps CLI as devmasterd client, not governance owner
Proposal does not authorize Web, IDE, real provider calls, or external repo mutation
Proposal defines smoke path against localhost devmasterd

tasks.title: Review Gate K CLI control-surface activation proposal
tasks.goal: Review the CLI control-surface activation proposal before any CLI implementation begins.
acceptance_checks: Gate K confirms CLI remains a devmasterd client
Gate K confirms CLI does not authorize Web, IDE, real provider calls, external repo mutation, deploy, or PR creation
Gate K confirms CLI smoke path uses localhost devmasterd
decision_records_required: Gate K CLI control-surface activation decision

tasks.title: Implement the local CLI control surface
tasks.goal: Implement a thin CLI client for localhost devmasterd status, evidence, intake, and smoke flows.
acceptance_checks: CLI reads daemon token from environment or explicit test-only smoke input
CLI calls devmasterd HTTP APIs and does not write daemon state/evidence directly
CLI smoke runs against localhost devmasterd and writes validation evidence
No external side effects are recorded

tasks.title: Review Gate L CLI control-surface evidence
tasks.goal: Review CLI smoke evidence before any Web Console, IDE extension, or real provider activation.
deliverables: Gate L CLI control-surface evidence review
acceptance_checks: Gate L confirms CLI calls devmasterd APIs instead of writing state directly
Gate L confirms CLI smoke passed against real localhost devmasterd
Gate L confirms no external side effects occurred
decision_records_required: Gate L CLI control-surface evidence decision

tasks.title: Draft the L1 prototype pipeline activation proposal
tasks.goal: Turn the validated daemon plus CLI control surface into a bounded proposal for the first local idea-to-runnable-prototype pipeline.
scope_out: real provider activation without adapter review
acceptance_checks: Proposal defines what counts as a runnable prototype artifact
Proposal defines the local validation and evidence path
Proposal keeps production, payment, auth, external repo, deploy, and PR work out of scope
Proposal defines the next gate before implementation
